calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between De'Angelo Salonga, Payee And Tbt Services, Llc, Petitioner Pursuant To California Insurance Code 1034 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JUAN C. LOZANO, Esq. of the Law Office of Juan C. Lozano (Tel: 619-647-9129) for petitioner Asset Security Consiulting, LLC;
DE'ANGELO SALONGA as the Payee;
Atty. MARTIN L. SHIVES, Esq. of Summers & Shives, A.P.C. (Tel: 858-874-1800) for Specially Appearing Interested Party Berkshire Hathaway Life Insurance Company of Mebraska;
BRENNAN NEVILLE as corporate representative Berkshire Hathaway Life Insurance Company of Mebraska.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER TBT SERVICES, LLC's Petition for Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between De'Angelo Salonga, Payee And TBT Services, LLC, Petitioner Pursuant To California Insurance Code 1034 Et Seq.

The Court inquires of the Payee as to her understanding of the transfer.

Argument presented by counsel as to the transfer. Matter submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Petition is granted.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
